nasb.text: thus says the Lord, “Behold, I bring evil on this place and on its inhabitants, even all the words of the book which the king of Judah has read.

esv.text: Thus says the Lord, Behold, I will bring disaster upon this place and upon its inhabitants, all the words of the book that the king of Judah has read.

cnv.text: 耶和華這樣說：看哪，我要照著猶大王所念那書卷上所有的話，使災禍降臨在這地方和它的居民身上，

ccb.text: 耶和华说，‘我要照犹大王所读的那书上的一切话，降灾难给这地方及这里的居民。
